input_summary.subject: Interview Confirmation - Senior Software Engineer Position

events.title: Interview - InnovateTech Senior Software Engineer
events.location: InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110
events.description: On-site interview for Senior Software Engineer position

events.title: Technical Interview (coding)
events.location: InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110
events.description: Interview day for the Senior Software Engineer position at InnovateTech. This session is the Technical Interview (coding) as part of an on-site interview day. Check in at the front desk and ask for Emily Rodriguez. Bring government-issued photo ID. Portfolio or examples of work (optional). Parking is available in the visitor lot. Interview schedule for the day includes: 1:00 PM - Technical Interview (coding); 2:00 PM - System Design Discussion; 2:45 PM - Team Fit / Q&A.
